title: ImageEval 2026 — Ayn-VQA Task 1a: Spoken VQA (English)
description: Given an image and the spoken question/options (English audio), pick the correct option index (0-2). Part of the ImageEval 2026 Ayn-VQA shared task on cultural grounding in Arabic multimodal understanding. Data on HuggingFace (QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA). Please also register at https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1QKF4rXD_gbLJlDykLvB0DGMIogwhraeOtWRiQiotucK0zA/viewform
description_zh:
我是一个科技竞赛信息翻译助手。您提供的文本已经是英文，我将其翻译成简体中文：

---

给定一张图像和口头问题/选项（英文音频），选择正确的选项索引（0-2）。ImageEval 2026 Ayn-VQA共享任务的一部分，专注于阿拉伯多模态理解中的文化基础。数据在HuggingFace上（QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA）。请同时在以下网址注册：https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1QKF4rXD_gbLJlDykLvB0DGMIogwhraeOtWRiQiotucK0zA/viewform

pages.title: Participation
pages.content:
# How to participate

**ImageEval 2026 — Ayn-VQA Task 1a: Spoken VQA (English)** — the **English** track of Task 1a
(Spoken VQA), part of the [ImageEval 2026](https://imageeval2026.github.io/) shared task on cultural
grounding in Arabic multimodal generation and understanding.

Given an image and the spoken question/options (English audio), pick the correct option index (0-2).

## Register (please do this first)
Fill in the **[registration form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1QKF4rXD_gbLJlDykLvB0DGMIogwhraeOtWRiQiotucK0zA/viewform)** — it lets the organisers track
participants and notify you about data, deadlines, and any updates.

## Who can join
Individuals or teams; one member submits on the team's behalf. You may enter more
than one track.

## Steps
1. Sign up on this Codabench page **and** the [registration form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1QKF4rXD_gbLJlDykLvB0DGMIogwhraeOtWRiQiotucK0zA/viewform).
2. Read the **Terms** tab — note the exact prediction format.
3. Get the data from the Hugging Face Hub: **[QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA)**.
4. Follow the task description in the [tasks repo](https://github.com/ImageEval2026/ImageEval2026-tasks).
5. Predict on **devtest** during the development phase, and on **test** during the
   final-evaluation phase.

## System description paper
All teams are encouraged to submit a system-description paper for the workshop.

## Contact
imageeval2026@gmail.com
pages.content_zh:
# 参与方式

**ImageEval 2026 — Ayn-VQA Task 1a: Spoken VQA (English)** — Task 1a（Spoken VQA）的**英文**赛道，属于[ImageEval 2026](https://imageeval2026.github.io/)共享任务，聚焦阿拉伯语多模态生成和理解中的文化融合。

给定一张图像和语音问题/选项（英文音频），选择正确的选项索引（0-2）。

## 注册（请首先完成此步骤）
填写**[注册表](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1QKF4rXD_gbLJlDykLvB0DGMIogwhraeOtWRiQiotucK0zA/viewform)** — 这样组织者可以追踪参赛者，并通知您有关数据、截止日期和任何更新的信息。

## 参赛资格
个人或团队；由团队成员代表提交。您可以参加多个赛道。

## 步骤
1. 在此Codabench页面**和** [注册表](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1QKF4rXD_gbLJlDykLvB0DGMIogwhraeOtWRiQiotucK0zA/viewform)上注册。
2. 阅读**Terms**标签 — 注意确切的预测格式。
3. 从Hugging Face Hub获取数据：**[QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA)**。
4. 按照[任务仓库](https://github.com/ImageEval2026/ImageEval2026-tasks)中的任务描述进行操作。
5. 在开发阶段对**devtest**进行预测，在最终评估阶段对**test**进行预测。

## 系统描述论文
鼓励所有团队为研讨会提交系统描述论文。

## 联系方式
imageeval2026@gmail.com

pages.title: Dataset
pages.content:
# Dataset

All splits live on the Hugging Face Hub — **[QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA)** — as config
`task1a_en`. This competition scores **devtest** (development phase) and **test**
(final phase).

```python
from datasets import load_dataset
ds = load_dataset("QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA", "task1a_en", split="devtest")
```

## Splits

| split | labels | items | phase | purpose |
|---|---|---:|---|---|
| `train`   | yes | 3000 | development | training / fine-tuning |
| `dev`     | yes | 500  | development | local validation |
| `devtest` | no  | 500  | development (leaderboard) | submission target, dev phase |
| `test`    | no  | 1000 | final evaluation | blind ranking (human-recorded audio) |

- **Language:** English.
- Media (images / audio) are referenced by **relative path** keyed on `id`.
- 🔊 Dev-phase audio is synthetically generated (voice cloning); the final **test** audio is human-recorded — expect a recording-condition shift.

## Licence
CC BY-NC 4.0 — non-commercial research use only.
pages.content_zh:
# 数据集

所有分割都位于 Hugging Face Hub — **[QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA)** — 配置为 `task1a_en`。本竞赛评分包括 **devtest**（开发阶段）和 **test**（最终阶段）。

```python
from datasets import load_dataset
ds = load_dataset("QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA", "task1a_en", split="devtest")
```

## 分割

| 分割 | 标签 | 项目数 | 阶段 | 用途 |
|---|---|---:|---|---|
| `train`   | 是 | 3000 | 开发 | 训练 / 微调 |
| `dev`     | 是 | 500  | 开发 | 本地验证 |
| `devtest` | 否  | 500  | 开发（排行榜） | 提交目标，开发阶段 |
| `test`    | 否  | 1000 | 最终评估 | 盲目排名（人工录制的音频） |

- **语言：** 英语。
- 媒体（图像 / 音频）通过以 `id` 为键的**相对路径**引用。
- 🔊 开发阶段的音频为合成生成（语音克隆）；最终 **test** 音频为人工录制 — 预期存在录音条件的差异。

## 许可证
CC BY-NC 4.0 — 仅限非商业研究使用。

pages.title: Timeline
pages.content:
# Timeline

## Development phase
Tune on `train` + `dev`; submit predictions on **devtest** for the leaderboard.

**Window:** `2026-05-22 → 2026-07-19`  ·  up to 5 submissions/day, 100 total.

## Testing phase
The blind **test** set is released on [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA); submit predictions
on `test` for the official ranking.

**Window:** `2026-07-20 → 2026-07-29`  ·  up to 20 submissions/day, 100 total.

> Dates are set in `competition.yaml` (`phases.start` / `phases.end`) — adjust if
> the schedule shifts. Announcements: [website](https://imageeval2026.github.io/).
pages.content_zh:
# 时间表

## 开发阶段
在`train` + `dev`上进行调试；在**devtest**上提交预测结果用于排行榜。

**时间窗口：** `2026-05-22 → 2026-07-19`  ·  每天最多5次提交，总共100次。

## 测试阶段
盲测**test**集合在[Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA)上发布；在`test`上提交预测结果用于官方排名。

**时间窗口：** `2026-07-20 → 2026-07-29`  ·  每天最多20次提交，总共100次。

> 日期设置在`competition.yaml`（`phases.start` / `phases.end`）中——如果时间表有变化，请进行调整。公告：[网站](https://imageeval2026.github.io/)。
